_meta.purpose: Per-prospect analyst REASONING (strengths/weaknesses/comps/scheme fits/archetype/injury notes) aggregated across public big boards. NO rank numbers stored. Feeds team-agent profile enrichment, NOT direct picks.
_meta.independence_note: Model must not consume analyst_board_mentions as a rank proxy — field reflects source coverage frequency, useful only as a signal-strength heuristic for reasoning confidence.
